contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 150
- Description: Built end-to-end asset receipt pipeline for double-entry DAO purchase accounting
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_client/pull/21
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_client/pull/22
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_client/pull/23
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/3
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/4
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/5
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1047
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/272
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/100
  
  Details:
  Built and deployed end-to-end asset receipt pipeline for double-entry DAO purchase accounting.
  
  What changed:
  - **dao_client**: Created `report_asset_receipt.py` module for `[ASSET RECEIPT EVENT]` (PR #21). Added CLI entry point (PR #22). Added `--attachment` file upload flag to `build_event_cli` so all modules can attach invoice PDFs (PR #23).
  - **truesight_autopilot**: Added `agentic_ai_context` to allowed repos (PR #3). Created `upload_file_to_github` tool for PDF archiving (PR #4). Fixed tool schema registration and handler (PR #5). Added Git Worktree Isolation rule to `AUTOPILOT_CODE_MODIFICATIONS.md`.
  - **sentiment_importer (Edgar)**: Added `[ASSET RECEIPT EVENT]` handler in `trigger_immediate_processing` with `WebhookTriggerWorker` dispatch to GAS (PR #1047). Deployed to production EC2 hosts (seni_ror + seni_sk).
  - **tokenomics**: Created `asset-receipt-ingest` GAS web app that processes `[ASSET RECEIPT EVENT]` from Telegram Chat Logs → Currencies row + sort → offchain transactions positive inventory leg → Asset Receipts audit tab (PR #272). Deployed via clasp (`macros/s/AKfycbzcXBXYKmKiYg-tS2cqf60gWVm0ro17ndWVMnxNkc0dimaGUW3CYoi4b8nMZzVbENaw/exec`).
  - **agentic_ai_context**: Added Git Worktree Isolation section (PR #100). Documented double-entry purchase workflow in `DAO_CLIENT_AI_AGENT_CONTRIBUTIONS.md`, `WORKSPACE_CONTEXT.md`, `CONTEXT_UPDATES.md`.
  
  Why: The DAO had no mechanism to record non-serialized physical asset purchases as double-entry inventory. The existing `[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]` only captured cash outflow. The new `[ASSET RECEIPT EVENT]` + GAS pipeline completes the double-entry cycle.
  
  End-to-end test: Processed a Bialetti Moka Express purchase ($116.91) — PDF uploaded to GitHub, both events submitted, GAS created Currencies row and offchain inventory leg. Pipeline verified working.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 250.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
